# Model 2 Test Skill

CI fixture for Model 2 distribution detection (Story 7.6 AC-2). The skill ships only a template (no precompiled SKILL.md) so the installer must invoke the compiler to produce the installed SKILL.md. The frontmatter substitutions make compiled output observably different from the raw template — a verbatim copy would still carry the unresolved markers in the frontmatter.
